name: Corn Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and sugar.
3. Add the eggs and milk to the dry ingredients, mixing until smooth.
4. Stir in the onion, green chiles, cumin, nutmeg, red pepper, and corn kernels.
5. Grease an oven-safe dish with the remaining margarine or butter.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until set.
7. Turn off the heat and carefully remove the souffle from the oven.
8. Serve immediately.
